## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff the Cresta account to the ongoing delivery team.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Team Review Burden:** Cresta's product team is spending too much time reviewing content for product alignment. The primary goal is to reduce this burden by proactively incorporating their nuanced perspectives.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Critical Indexing Issue:** Content published since New Year's is not indexing, despite a recent fix for a canonicalization error. Aida is manually submitting pages in GSC; if this fails, Bailey will escalate to Talal and Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [**Nuanced Brand Positioning:** Cresta is an AI layer *on top of* contact center platforms, not a direct competitor. Content must differentiate them from platforms like Sierra and Decagon.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**Handoff Plan:** Rachel will generate content next week, with Ade reviewing it before client submission to ensure a smooth transition.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Strategy

  - [**Primary Goal:** Drive middle-of-funnel (MoFu) leads and revenue within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Content Mix:** 50/50 balance of commercial (e.g., listicles, comparisons) and educational intent.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Stakeholders:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Russell:** CMO](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Nikki:** Content Manager (reviews for writing quality)](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Devin:** VP of Product Marketing (reviews for product alignment)](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Annie:** Digital Marketing Manager](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Key Directive:** Cresta wants modern, AI-focused content. The previous agency was perceived as "stuck in the past."](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Core Challenge: Product Team Alignment

  - [**Problem:** Cresta's product team spends excessive time reviewing content.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Goal:** Reduce review time significantly within one month.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proactively incorporate their nuanced perspectives, which often differ from general internet consensus.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida is scheduling a Friday meeting with PM Oren to get direct input on topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**Action:** Ade will create a doc summarizing recurring product feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Critical Issue: Content Indexing

  - [**Problem:** Content published since New Year's is not indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A canonicalization error on the Cresta site, now reportedly fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
    1.  [**Aida:** Manually submitting pages in Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
    2.  [**Aida:** If not indexed by Thursday/Friday, escalate to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
    3.  [**Bailey:** Escalate to Talal and Kyle if the issue persists.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Content Production & Assets

  - [**Proprietary Assets:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Case Studies Artifact:** List of approved case studies for content (some are NDA-protected).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Statistics Reference Doc:** Proprietary data from Cresta reports.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
          - [**Requirement:** Each article must include at least one stat.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
          - [**Linking:** Always link to the report landing page, not the PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Cresta IQ Series:** Blog posts with proprietary data and infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
          - [**Use:** Infographics can be copied directly into articles to add authority and break up text.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The industry moves fast (e.g., new features).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**Solution:** An Airtable automation will flag competitive articles for review every 3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [**Platform:** Webflow (easy to use).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [**Process:** Ade and Aida have been self-publishing for speed. A Linear ticket will be created to add Webflow publishing to Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Imagery:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Current:** Free stock photos (Unsplash, Pexels).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Avoid generic "headphones" imagery.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [**Future:** Aida and Katya are meeting with Cresta's designer to align on AI-generated image style.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Schedule Friday meeting with PM Oren (add Bailey, Rachel).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Monitor GSC indexing; escalate to Bailey by Friday if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Create Airtable automation for 3-month competitive content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [Create Linear ticket for Webflow publishing in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Ade:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Meet with Rachel this week to review pipelines and editorial process.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [Finalize and share V1 of Operational Manual and Editorial Checklist by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [Create doc summarizing recurring product feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [Meet with Ade this week to review pipelines and editorial process.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [Generate content next week, sending to Ade for pre-submission review.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [Review all Cresta documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Join weekly client syncs (Tuesdays).](https://fathom.video/share/PLpHTz5s8ivFhpihxQtwQDY_8i_J2jtE?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
